ddls:
CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "career_start_year" INTEGER /* Year when the manager started their career */,
  "career_end_year" INTEGER /* Year when the manager ended their career */,
  "manager_nickname" TEXT /* Nickname of the manager */,
  "manager_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the manager */,
  "manager_dod" TEXT /* Date of death of the manager */,
  "manager_bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the manager */,
  "manager_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the manager's image */,
  "manager_awards" TEXT /* Awards and honors received by the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year of the baseball season */,
  "season_description" TEXT /* Description of the baseball season */,
  "season_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "season_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of season (e.g., regular, playoffs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the baseball team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "dissolved_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was dissolved */,
  "team_city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "team_stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_foundation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the team's foundation */,
  "team_dissolution_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the team's dissolution */,
  "team_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Primary and secondary colors of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the baseball league */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "dissolved_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was dissolved */,
  "league_city" TEXT /* City where the league is based */,
  "league_foundation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the league's foundation */,
  "league_dissolution_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the league's dissolution */,
  "league_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the league's logo */,
  "league_website" TEXT /* URL to the league's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "manager_id" TEXT /* ID of the manager */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team */,
  "league_id" TEXT /* ID of the league */,
  "inseason" INTEGER /* In-season or pre-season indicator */,
  "half" INTEGER /* First or second half of the season */,
  "games" INTEGER /* Total games played */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Final rank in the league */,
  "runs_scored" INTEGER /* Total runs scored by the team */,
  "runs_allowed" INTEGER /* Total runs allowed by the team */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of games won */,
  "home_wins" INTEGER /* Number of home games won */,
  "away_wins" INTEGER /* Number of away games won */,
  "home_losses" INTEGER /* Number of home games lost */,
  "away_losses" INTEGER /* Number of away games lost */,
  "playoff_appearances" INTEGER /* Number of playoff appearances */,
  "championships" INTEGER /* Number of championships won */,
  "winning_streak" INTEGER /* Longest winning streak */,
  "losing_streak" INTEGER /* Longest losing streak */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_performance_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_performance_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_performance_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team the player is on */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Player's batting average */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs */,
  "rbis" INTEGER /* Number of runs batted in */,
  "player_position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "player_age" INTEGER /* Age of the player during the season */,
  "player_height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "player_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "player_batting_hand" TEXT /* Batting hand (right, left, switch) */,
  "player_throwing_hand" TEXT /* Throwing hand (right, left) */,
  "player_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_dod" TEXT /* Date of death of the player */,
  "player_bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the player */,
  "player_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_logs" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team that played */,
  "opponent_id" TEXT /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (win/loss) */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "umpire_names" TEXT /* Names of the umpires */,
  "game_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_away_team FOREIGN KEY ("away_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_home_team FOREIGN KEY ("home_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "user_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the user */,
  "user_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Type of device used for access */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of the user during access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
